p2p_enrichment.notes: Added 2 pass_to_pass tests based on repo CI: (1) test_repo_lint - runs npm run lint which includes typecheck+eslint+prettier, (2) test_repo_status_tests - runs vitest on __tests__/utils/status to verify modified module tests pass. Both pass on base commit. Skipped npm run build due to output size issues with pipe. Skipped full npm run test due to unrelated test flakiness.
